name: A Mouse's Wisdom
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Faded Legacy - Ch. 2 - Waxen Legacy
lore:
The little mouse and its owner share many traits:
Cunning, bravery, and speed...
They freely roam the gaps between the scattered houses in the Eastern District, using the sky as their blanket and rooftops as their bed.
They thrive in the corners of the city.
